why_this_test: Checks if ML improves precision under the same comparator semantics.
Tests whether observed precision difference is statistically significant.
Verifies threshold policy remains at or above the SDE precision floor.
Checks that most exclusions are horizon-related, supporting comparator interpretation.
Ensures calibrated constrained policy is precise enough for strategy actions.
Measures whether candidate thresholds can reliably satisfy precision constraints.
Checks constrained policy stability when precision floor is hard to satisfy.
Guards against feature/schema skew between offline training and live serving.
Checks p95 end-to-end inference latency against operational budget.
Ensures prediction path remains available across replayed events.
Combines B/C/D/F/G evidence into one actionable readiness decision.
Verifies grouped race CV and OOF coverage assumptions are preserved.
Ensures fairness contract (actionable-only, fixed horizon, one-to-one matching) stays frozen.
